name: Butter Bean-Broccoli Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the frozen vegetables as directed on the package and drain.
2. Mix the beans and broccoli together to form the first layer in a 9 x 13-inch baking dish.
3. Top with sliced water chestnuts.
4. In a separate bowl, mix together the mushroom soup and sour cream.
5. Spread this mixture over the water chestnuts as the third layer.
6. Sprinkle the onion soup mix over the sour cream mixture.
7. Top with Rice Krispies and drizzle melted butter over all.
8. Bake at 350°F for 30 minutes.
NOTE: This casserole can be made ahead and frozen, omitting the Rice Krispies and butter until time to cook.
